title: Innovation in Real Places
author: Dan Breznitz
subline: Why the global economy thrives outside Silicon Valley.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A simple world map made of dots — each dot a city. The red dot is the only one in the center of a region: it represents a non-Silicon-Valley innovation hub. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)" fill="#cccccc">
    <g opacity="0.55">
      <circle cx="-560" cy="-260" r="3"/><circle cx="-510" cy="-220" r="3"/><circle cx="-460" cy="-200" r="3"/><circle cx="-410" cy="-180" r="3"/><circle cx="-360" cy="-220" r="3"/><circle cx="-310" cy="-160" r="3"/><circle cx="-260" cy="-200" r="3"/><circle cx="-210" cy="-180" r="3"/><circle cx="-160" cy="-220" r="3"/><circle cx="-110" cy="-160" r="3"/><circle cx="-60" cy="-200" r="3"/><circle cx="-10" cy="-180" r="3"/><circle cx="40" cy="-220" r="3"/><circle cx="90" cy="-160" r="3"/><circle cx="140" cy="-200" r="3"/><circle cx="190" cy="-180" r="3"/><circle cx="240" cy="-220" r="3"/><circle cx="290" cy="-160" r="3"/><circle cx="340" cy="-200" r="3"/><circle cx="390" cy="-180" r="3"/><circle cx="440" cy="-220" r="3"/><circle cx="490" cy="-160" r="3"/><circle cx="540" cy="-200" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-560" cy="-200" r="3"/><circle cx="-510" cy="-160" r="3"/><circle cx="-460" cy="-140" r="3"/><circle cx="-410" cy="-120" r="3"/><circle cx="-360" cy="-160" r="3"/><circle cx="-310" cy="-100" r="3"/><circle cx="-260" cy="-140" r="3"/><circle cx="-210" cy="-120" r="3"/><circle cx="-160" cy="-160" r="3"/><circle cx="-110" cy="-100" r="3"/><circle cx="-60" cy="-140" r="3"/><circle cx="-10" cy="-120" r="3"/><circle cx="40" cy="-160" r="3"/><circle cx="90" cy="-100" r="3"/><circle cx="140" cy="-140" r="3"/><circle cx="190" cy="-120" r="3"/><circle cx="240" cy="-160" r="3"/><circle cx="290" cy="-100" r="3"/><circle cx="340" cy="-140" r="3"/><circle cx="390" cy="-120" r="3"/><circle cx="440" cy="-160" r="3"/><circle cx="490" cy="-100" r="3"/><circle cx="540" cy="-140" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-460" cy="-60" r="3"/><circle cx="-410" cy="-40" r="3"/><circle cx="-360" cy="-80" r="3"/><circle cx="-310" cy="-20" r="3"/><circle cx="-260" cy="-60" r="3"/><circle cx="-210" cy="-40" r="3"/><circle cx="-160" cy="-80" r="3"/><circle cx="-110" cy="-20" r="3"/><circle cx="-60" cy="-60" r="3"/><circle cx="-10" cy="-40" r="3"/><circle cx="40" cy="-80" r="3"/><circle cx="90" cy="-20" r="3"/><circle cx="140" cy="-60" r="3"/><circle cx="190" cy="-40" r="3"/><circle cx="240" cy="-80" r="3"/><circle cx="290" cy="-20" r="3"/><circle cx="340" cy="-60" r="3"/><circle cx="390" cy="-40" r="3"/><circle cx="440" cy="-80" r="3"/><circle cx="490" cy="-20" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-360" cy="40" r="3"/><circle cx="-310" cy="60" r="3"/><circle cx="-260" cy="20" r="3"/><circle cx="-210" cy="40" r="3"/><circle cx="-160" cy="0" r="3"/><circle cx="-110" cy="60" r="3"/><circle cx="-60" cy="20" r="3"/><circle cx="-10" cy="40" r="3"/><circle cx="40" cy="0" r="3"/><circle cx="90" cy="60" r="3"/><circle cx="140" cy="20" r="3"/><circle cx="190" cy="40" r="3"/><circle cx="240" cy="0" r="3"/><circle cx="290" cy="60" r="3"/><circle cx="340" cy="20" r="3"/><circle cx="390" cy="40" r="3"/><circle cx="440" cy="0" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-260" cy="120" r="3"/><circle cx="-210" cy="140" r="3"/><circle cx="-160" cy="100" r="3"/><circle cx="-110" cy="140" r="3"/><circle cx="-60" cy="100" r="3"/><circle cx="-10" cy="120" r="3"/><circle cx="40" cy="100" r="3"/><circle cx="90" cy="140" r="3"/><circle cx="140" cy="100" r="3"/><circle cx="190" cy="120" r="3"/><circle cx="240" cy="100" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-160" cy="200" r="3"/><circle cx="-110" cy="220" r="3"/><circle cx="-60" cy="180" r="3"/><circle cx="-10" cy="200" r="3"/><circle cx="40" cy="180" r="3"/><circle cx="90" cy="220" r="3"/><circle cx="140" cy="180" r="3"/>
    </g>
    <circle cx="380" cy="60" r="9" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <circle cx="380" cy="60" r="22" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A dot-map of cities rendered in ash, with one red dot in the periphery (a non-SV innovation hub). The 320px mixed-case title sits at the bottom, so the dot map dominates the top 2/3. The red is the OUTLIER city — the book's central claim that innovation thrives in unexpected places.
